title: Tie Dropdown Column to Time Tracker Column
excerpt: Our team greatly appreciates the time tracking column feature. However, we believe it would be even more beneficial if it could be integrated with a dropdown column. This would allow us to specify the task or deliverable…

posts.author: DrewM (Drew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our team greatly appreciates the time tracking column feature. However, we believe it would be even more beneficial if it could be integrated with a dropdown column. This would allow us to specify the task or deliverable the time is being tracked for, rather than attributing it to the entire project row.

In our current board setup, a single project can encompass multiple tasks or outputs that need completion before project closure. These tasks are outlined in a dropdown list based on the project’s scope. Integrating the time tracker with this dropdown column would enable users to select the specific action they worked on and ensure more accurate time tracking.
